description: `obs.flatMap(cb)` with a component-returning cb lifts to `obs.pipe(map(a => a.flat()), mapToComponents(cb))` — the same keyed list as the `.map` form, but flattening the source one level first so the cb maps each leaf (with its flat index). A destructured leaf param is rebound like the `.map` item; a plain leaf param works too (`.flat()` is a no-op on an already-flat stream).
